mapper.insert: INSERT INTO halfauto_position (symbol, position_side, entry_price, initial_margin, leverage, exchange) VALUES (#{symbol}, #{positionSide}, #{entryPrice}, #{initialMargin}, #{leverage}, #{exchange})
mapper.select: SELECT id, symbol, position_side, entry_price, initial_margin, leverage, exchange, created_at, closed_at FROM halfauto_position WHERE symbol = #{symbol} AND position_side = #{positionSide} AND closed_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
